name: freediving-apnea
description: Freediving breath-hold attempts: static apnea (maximal breath-hold, time-scored) and dynamic apnea without fins (maximal distance on one breath). Both are open-ended 'push it as far as possible' efforts, encoded the same way as the Wim Hof retention hold — a `to_breath` stopCondition Target on the prescribed side, with the actual achieved value on the performed side. Two Exercises under one Session; `freediving` is an open discipline token not yet in the recommended-canon list (round-trips regardless, §5.9).
